channel.title: Bloomberg Green Global
channel.description: Últimos artigos de Bloomberg Green Global

item.title: Wall Street Seeks Catastrophe Modelers and Weather Analysts
item.description: Some firms are seeking to expand their insurance-linked securities desks
item.dc:creator: Gautam Naik, Olivia Raimonde

item.title: PE Firm ARM-Harith Targets $200 Million for Africa Climate Fund
item.description: ARM-Harith Infrastructure Investments Ltd., a private equity fund manager, said it aims to raise $200 million to invest in energy and climate infrastructure projects across sub-Saharan Africa.
item.dc:creator: Emele Onu

item.title: New York Just Got a Huge Influx of Clean Power. It Still Needs More
item.description: The Champlain Hudson Power Express carries abundant hydropower from Quebec to Queens. It only goes partway toward meeting the state’s fast-rising electricity demand.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Raimonde

item.title: El Niño Is Already Impacting India’s Critical Monsoon
item.description: Early signs of how El Niño may reshape global weather patterns are starting to show in the late onset and expected weakness of India’s monsoon rains.
item.dc:creator: Mary Hui

item.title: Legal & General Says Energy Transition is ‘Alive and Well’
item.description: In a new report, the UK insurer and asset manager challenged the notion that the shift to a low-carbon economy has stalled.
item.dc:creator: Alastair Marsh

item.title: Hedge Funds Are Expanding Desks Designed to Profit From Natural-Catastrophe Risk
item.description: When Mitesh Parikh, a headhunter at UK recruiter Selby Jennings, started looking for an ILS modeler for a large US hedge fund this year, the pool of qualified candidates was disconcertingly small.
item.dc:creator: Gautam Naik

item.title: Flood Warnings for South China Farmlands Raise Rice-Crop Risks
item.description: Forecasts for heavy rains in southern China over the next week are raising the risk of flash floods, potentially inundating crops and damaging rice fields.
item.dc:creator: Mary Hui

item.title: Mexico Awards 37 Renewable Electricity Projects in Tender, Report Says
item.description: Mexico’s electricity commission concluded the first bidding process under its new mixed-investment scheme for renewable energy, to add an expected 7,411 megawatts of generation capacity, a local outlet reported.
item.dc:creator: Nicolle Yapur, Scott Squires

item.title: China Issues Alert for Flood Risks in Hunan, Guangxi, Guizhou
item.description: China issued a red alert for mountain flooding on Sunday, warning that parts of southwestern Hunan, northern Guangxi and southeastern Guizhou face a high risk of flash floods triggered by heavy rainfall, according to a report by China Central Television.
item.dc:creator: Charlie Zhu, Ying Tian, Qianwei Zhang
